name: content-brief
description: Generate a detailed content brief that gives a writer everything they need to produce a well-researched, SEO-optimized, on-brand article without revision cycles.
input_description: Target keyword or topic, content goal (rank, lead gen, thought leadership), target audience, word count target, and any competitor URLs or notes.
output_description: Comprehensive content brief including goal, audience persona, keyword targets, suggested title options, outline with H2/H3 structure, angle/hook, research prompts, tone guidance, internal link suggestions, and success metrics.
